```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parâmetros aleatórios
theta <- sample(c(3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10), 1)
n     <- sample(c(25, 36, 50, 100), 1)
xbar  <- round(theta / 2 + runif(1, -0.5, 0.5), 2)

## Resposta correta
correct <- round(2 * xbar, 4)

## Alternativas incorretas plausíveis
w1 <- round(xbar, 4)
w2 <- round(xbar / 2, 4)
w3 <- round(3 * xbar, 4)
w4 <- round(2 * xbar + 1, 4)

## Garantir unicidade
if (w1 == correct) w1 <- round(xbar + 0.1, 4)
if (w2 == correct) w2 <- round(xbar / 2 - 0.1, 4)
if (w3 == correct) w3 <- round(3 * xbar + 0.1, 4)
if (w4 == correct) w4 <- round(2 * xbar + 1.5, 4)
if (w2 == w1)      w2 <- round(xbar / 3, 4)

## Embaralhamento SEMPRE
all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========

Seja $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} U(0, \theta)$ com $E(X) = \theta/2$. O estimador pelo método dos momentos iguala $\bar{X} = \hat{\theta}/2$, resultando em $\hat{\theta}_{MM} = 2\bar{X}$. Com $n = `r n`$ e $\bar{X} = `r xbar`$, calcule $\hat{\theta}_{MM}$.

Answerlist
----------

* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========

Para $X_i \sim U(0, \theta)$, o primeiro momento teórico é $\mu_1 = E(X) = \theta/2$. O método dos momentos iguala $m_1 = \bar{X}$ a $\mu_1 = \theta/2$:
$$\bar{X} = \frac{\hat{\theta}}{2} \implies \hat{\theta}_{MM} = 2\bar{X} = 2 \times `r xbar` = `r correct`.$$

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap3S1Q5_emm_uniforme
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
